content:
Hi Chan — quick answer below.

- Most expensive by latest market valuation: **PROP-0001 — "Land near river"** at **$1.45M** (latest valuation May 2026).  
  [View Property](/property/PROP-0001)

- Highest purchase price in your portfolio: **PROP-0011 — "BKK1 Prime Land"** purchased at **$1.45M**.  
  [View Property](/property/PROP-0011)

Note: many properties don’t have current market values recorded, so a few could be worth more than these if re‑valued. Want me to run/update valuations for the whole portfolio or sort properties by estimated value? How can I help you with your portfolio today?
